text: I feel a sense of anticipation and boundless curiosity here. The glass separates me from a space of dialogue and creation, as people gather in a room adorned with intriguing signs of research and development. Within these reflective enclosures, I sense the promise of collective exploration—a community seeking answers in the fertile ground between questions and possibility. The sight of the R+D display energizes me, as if I am both observer and participant in the evolving story of human inquiry.
